title: IEPRecord
description: Canonical, source-grounded extraction of one physical IEP document within a stable record lineage.

iep_record_id.description: Stable UUID for this physical IEP lineage; it is preserved when the same IEP is extracted again and differs from the per-run extraction identifier.

student_ref.description: District or SIS identifier for the student whose IEP was extracted; this external reference is not required to be a UUID.

disability_category.description: Eligibility or disability category stated in the approved IEP, preserved as document language rather than inferred by the system.

school_year.description: School year covered by the IEP in YYYY-YYYY form, with application validation requiring consecutive years.

accommodations.description: Approved accommodations extracted from the IEP, each with a stable identity and mandatory source evidence.

services.description: Mandated services extracted from the IEP, including delivery schedule and mandatory source evidence.

goals.description: Measurable annual goals extracted from the IEP, including progress criteria and mandatory source evidence.

dates.description: School-local compliance dates represented without times so timezone conversion cannot change a legal deadline.

field_confidences.description: Extraction confidence for canonical scalar and date fields that do not carry item-level confidence.

extraction_meta.description: Provenance for this particular extraction run; these values may change while the IEP record identity remains stable.

id.description: Stable UUID carried forward by reconciliation when this accommodation reappears in a later extraction of the same IEP.

text.description: Exact approved accommodation language, normalized only enough to remove extraction artifacts without changing meaning.

applies_to.description: Scopes used by the deterministic rules engine to distribute the accommodation by subject, instructional context, or every class.

source_page.description: One-based page number containing the evidence for this accommodation in the normalized source document.

source_quote.description: Verbatim source excerpt that supports the extracted accommodation and is shown during human review.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 for this accommodation, used by the confidence gate and evaluation harness.

reconciliation_status.description: Identity-reconciliation result against the prior approved extraction: matched preserves a prior ID, new allocates a new stable ID, ambiguous requires human resolution, and null is reserved for the first extraction in an IEP lineage.

id.description: Stable UUID carried forward by reconciliation when this service reappears in a later extraction of the same IEP.

type.description: Type of mandated special-education or related service stated in the IEP.

minutes_per_week.description: Total number of service minutes mandated per week, normalized for deterministic compliance accounting.

frequency.description: Service frequency or schedule language stated in the IEP, retained for reviewer verification.

provider_role.description: Role responsible for delivering the service, such as speech-language pathologist or special educator.

start.description: School-local YYYY-MM-DD date on which service delivery begins, or null when the source does not provide a reliable date.

end.description: School-local YYYY-MM-DD date on which service delivery ends, or null when the source does not provide a reliable date.

source_page.description: One-based page number containing the evidence for this mandated service.

source_quote.description: Verbatim source excerpt supporting the service type, schedule, minutes, and provider assignment.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 for this service, used by the confidence gate and evaluation harness.

reconciliation_status.description: Identity-reconciliation result against the prior approved extraction: matched preserves a prior ID, new allocates a new stable ID, ambiguous requires human resolution, and null is reserved for the first extraction in an IEP lineage.

id.description: Stable UUID carried forward by reconciliation when this goal reappears in a later extraction of the same IEP.

text.description: Complete measurable annual goal language as approved in the IEP.

baseline.description: Present level or starting performance against which progress toward this goal is measured.

target.description: Expected performance threshold or outcome that constitutes attainment of the goal.

measure.description: Assessment, observation, work sample, or other method specified for measuring progress.

progress_cadence.description: Required frequency for collecting or reporting progress evidence for this goal.

source_page.description: One-based page number containing the evidence for this annual goal.

source_quote.description: Verbatim source excerpt supporting the goal, baseline, target, measure, and cadence.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 for this goal, used by the confidence gate and evaluation harness.

reconciliation_status.description: Identity-reconciliation result against the prior approved extraction: matched preserves a prior ID, new allocates a new stable ID, ambiguous requires human resolution, and null is reserved for the first extraction in an IEP lineage.

annual_review.description: School-local YYYY-MM-DD annual-review deadline, or null when reliable source evidence is unavailable.

triennial_reeval.description: School-local YYYY-MM-DD triennial-reevaluation deadline, or null when reliable source evidence is unavailable.

last_progress_report.description: School-local YYYY-MM-DD date of the most recent documented progress report, or null when none is available.

student_ref.description: Extraction confidence for student_ref; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

disability_category.description: Extraction confidence for disability_category; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

school_year.description: Extraction confidence for school_year; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

annual_review.description: Extraction confidence for annual_review; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

triennial_reeval.description: Extraction confidence for triennial_reeval; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

last_progress_report.description: Extraction confidence for last_progress_report; 0.0 required when the value is absent or unreliable.

model.description: Pinned model identifier used for the structured extraction, retained for reproducibility and audit.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this extraction attempt; unlike iep_record_id, it changes on every re-extraction.

page_count.description: Number of normalized source pages processed during this extraction run.

legibility_scores.description: Per-page legibility scores from 0.0 to 1.0 in page order, with exactly one value for each source page.

extracted_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when this extraction run completed.
